EverythingYouNeed.headline: Everything you need to grow your restaurant
EverythingYouNeed.description: Powerful tools made for restaurants. Create a stunning profile page, share all your links, take direct orders with payments, and track performance. No commissions. Just your brand, fully in control.

01.title: Attractive Restaurant Page
01.description: A beautiful, (mobile)-friendly page that perfectly reflects your restaurant’s unique style.

02.title: User-Friendly Dashboard
02.description: Easily customize colors, fonts, logos, and more from one intuitive dashboard.

03.title: Integrated Food Order System
03.description: Manage orders yourself and receive payments directly, no third-party platforms, no commissions.

04.title: Analytics & Insights
04.description: Track views, clicks, and orders to better understand your audience and improve performance.

05.title: Event Calendar
05.description: Create a clear and engaging calendar for events, tastings, or live music.

06.title: QR Codes
06.description: Generate, personalize, and track QR codes to see how often they are scanned.

HowItWorks.headline: How dineri.app works
HowItWorks.description: Set up, customize, and go live within a few minutes

01.title: Create your Profile
01.description: Sign up and customize your restaurant page with your logo, photos, and key information.

02.title: Add your content
02.description: Upload your menu, highlight events or promotions, and link your socials, all in one place.

03.title: Share with customers
03.description: Share your unique Dineri link via Instagram, Google Business, and flyers to connect with your guests.

Plans.headline: Affordable plans
Plans.description: Clear and honest pricing, with zero hidden costs, built to grow your business.

Faqs.headline: Got questions?
Faqs.description: Everything you need to know about our services

01.question: Do I need technical skills to use Dineri.app?
answer: No, Dineri.app is designed to be user-friendly. You don’t need any coding knowledge and everything works with simple forms and settings. The platform is also fully mobile-friendly, so you can easily update and manage your restaurant’s page directly from your phone.

02.question: Can I connect my existing reservation system?
answer: At the moment, full integrations with well-known reservation systems are not yet available. We are actively working on this and plan to release it as a new feature soon. For now, you can simply add the link to your existing reservation tool on your Dineri.app page.

03.question: Which domain extensions can I use with Dineri.app?
answer: If you don’t have a domain yet, you can choose from one of our free domains tailored to your market. For example Ibiza.rest, Dineri.me, Thechef.me and many more.
We are continuously acquiring cool and professional domain extensions so we can offer you even more options that perfectly fit your business, all available for free.

04.question: Are there any commission fees?
answer: No. With Dineri.app, you keep 100% of your earnings. No commission on take-away, or delivery orders. Unlike many platforms that charge 10–30% per order, you only pay your subscription. More profit, full control, and no surprises.
Best of all, your payments go directly to your bank account, giving you full control and instant access to your earnings.

Understand.headline: Understand your audience, grow your restaurant
Understand.description: Track clicks, revenue, and QR scans in real time. Get clear insights into what’s working, so you can make smarter updates and keep customers coming back.
